finiteTraceQuotientConstantStatus.label: finite trace quotient dimensions
finiteTraceQuotientConstantStatus.reason: The augmented finite trace model has a resolved positive trace rank.

finiteRangeResidualConstantStatus.label: finite Schur range residual
finiteRangeResidualConstantStatus.reason: The normalized Douglas range residual is below the certificate tolerance.

finiteDaugNonnegativeConstantStatus.label: finite D_aug,N nonnegative constant
finiteDaugNonnegativeConstantStatus.reason: The computed lower spectral endpoint of D_aug,N is nonnegative up to the stated tolerance.

finiteSchurGapConstantStatus.label: finite Schur complement gap
finiteSchurGapConstantStatus.reason: The repaired Schur complement lower endpoint is nonnegative up to tolerance.

finiteRepairedFormConstantStatus.label: finite repaired form lower endpoint
finiteRepairedFormConstantStatus.reason: The repaired finite form lower endpoint is nonnegative up to tolerance.

finiteMuAnnihilationConstantStatus.label: finite Mu kernel annihilation constant
finiteMuAnnihilationConstantStatus.reason: The Mu rows vanish on the augmented finite trace kernel up to tolerance.
